prompt: The invoice payment workflow currently selects and updates invoices using only an invoice number. Invoice numbers are unique within an account, not across all accounts, so paying one account's invoice can mutate another account's invoice. Fix the account-isolation bug. Remove the unscoped FindByNumberAsync(string invoiceNumber, ...) and UpdateAsync(Invoice invoice, ...) overloads from IInvoiceRepository so its lookup and update contract requires an account identity, and update InvoicePaymentService.MarkPaidAsync to pass the requested accountId to both repository operations. Preserve the existing InvoiceNotFoundException policy for invoices absent from the requested account, the no-write behavior and original audit values of already-paid invoices, and the existing audit-field behavior for a newly paid invoice. Do not change tests/BillingPartition.Tests/Program.cs, tests/BillingPartition.Tests/BillingPartition.Tests.csproj, tests/verify.sh, or .gitignore. Run `sh tests/verify.sh` to verify the fix.
